subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Youth unto all that dwell in the heavens and on earth, that haply the Words of God may draw them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الغلام الی من فی السموات و الارضین لعل یجذبهم کلمات الله و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude
